title: Kamala surges, Trump at NABJ, recession fears, Middle East escalation, Ackman postpones IPO
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros!

(0:38) Election update: Dems energize around Kamala, policy questions remain

(19:33) Trump's NABJ interview: smart or risky?

(33:07) Markets expect rate cut in September, but are we already in a recession?

(40:58) AI buildout causing short-term volatility

(45:46) Assassination of Hamas leader Ismail Haniyeh: are we inching closer to war in the Middle East?

(1:06:17) Bill Ackman withdraws Pershing Square USA IPO

analysis.summary: The episode covers various topics including the surge of Kamala Harris in the presidential election, Trump's interview at NABJ, recession fears, Middle East escalation, and Bill Ackman postponing his IPO. The hosts discuss the potential implications of these events on the economy and politics. They also touch on the buildout of AI and its effects on the market.

takeaways.text: Kamala Harris is gaining momentum in the presidential election
Trump's NABJ interview may have been a smart or risky move
Markets expect a rate cut in September, but recession fears persist
AI buildout is causing short-term volatility in the market
The assassination of Hamas leader Ismail Haniyeh may lead to war in the Middle East
Bill Ackman withdraws Pershing Square USA IPO
The hosts discuss the potential implications of these events on the economy and politics

quotes.text: Are we already in a recession?
quotes.speaker: Unknown

sentiment.notes: The hosts express caution about the potential implications of the discussed events on the economy and politics. They also show concern about the buildout of AI and its effects on the market.

notable_moments.description: Bill Ackman withdraws Pershing Square USA IPO
